name: BELLA
description: Tier 1 — raw tokens: colors, spacing, typography, radius, shadow, blur, motion. No semantic meaning; referenced by Semantic and Component tiers.

name: Light
description: Tier 2 — Light mode. Warm parchment surface, dark ink text, amber accents. References Tier 1 primitives.

name: Dark
description: Tier 2 — Dark mode. Ink page, parchment text, amber accents preserved. References Tier 1 primitives.

name: BELLA
description: Tier 3 — Component tokens: button, card, tag, eyebrow, input, link, nav-link. References Tier 2 semantic (mode-aware) and Tier 1 primitives. Mode-switching cascades automatically through semantic references.
